caption: The video features three individuals seated on wooden chairs on a stage, engaged in a discussion. The setting is illuminated with purple and blue lighting, creating a vibrant atmosphere. The person on the left, dressed in a white shirt and dark pants, appears to be listening attentively. The individual in the center, wearing a black t-shirt and black pants, seems to be speaking, as indicated by their open mouth and expressive posture. The person on the right, dressed in a gray suit, is also actively participating in the conversation, gesturing slightly with their hands. A unique table with a circuit board design is placed in front of them, adding a tech-savvy element to the scene. The background includes various stage equipment and lights, suggesting that this is part of a live event or talk show.
